sources.notes: Verified public MoonCatRescue site. Use as an entrypoint, not as a substitute for exact contract or parser data.

sources.label: ponderware GitHub
sources.notes: Verified GitHub account linked from the MoonCatRescue developer page for historical original-code context.

sources.label: ponderware mooncatparser
sources.notes: Verified repository describing itself as the official MoonCat generation library. Do not derive trait mappings without a separate review.

sources.label: ponderware MoonCatRescue contract repository
sources.notes: Verified repository describing itself as the official MoonCatRescue Ethereum smart contract. Exact addresses remain intentionally unfilled.

sources.label: MoonCatRescue.sol raw source
sources.notes: Raw Solidity source used for the first protocol-constants import pass.

sources.label: MoonCat DAO GitHub
sources.notes: Verified GitHub URL provided by the user. Treat repository contents according to their own provenance before deriving canonical data.

sources.label: Rate My Mooncat
sources.notes: Verified reachable site. The site states its character-cat charts are subjective DAO/community narratives and not official traits.

sources.label: MoonCat DAO old wiki
sources.notes: Verified reachable GitHub path. Treat as community-maintained historical context until individual pages are reviewed.

sources.label: MoonCats FAQ and official links
sources.notes: Local Discord-derived file supplied as mostly correct but potentially outdated. Use it to discover links, then verify each link before importing facts.
